info.title: tnt
info.description:
(c) 2020 Armin Sander
init               Initialize the current directory. Creates the '.tnt'
directory and the 'sources.json' file.
add                Add a new language or assembly.
remove             Remove an assembly from the list of sources.
extract            Extract all strings from all sources and update the
translations.
gc                 Remove all unused translation records.
status             Show all the translations and their status.
export             Export all strings to Excel or XLIFF files.
import             Import Excel or XLIFF translation files and apply the
changes to the translations in the current directory.
translate          Machine translate new strings.
sync               Synchronize all the translations in the '.tnt-content'
directory.
show               Show system related or detail information.
add-command        Add a new shell command.
remove-commands    Remove shell commands.
list-commands      List shell commands.
edit-commands      Edit shell commands.
help               Display more information on a specific command.
version            Display version information.

commands.name: init
commands.description:
Initialize the current directory. Creates the '.tnt'
directory and the 'sources.json' file.

options.name: --language
options.description:
The source language (code ['-' region] or name), defaults to
'en-US'.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a new language or assembly.

options.name: --language
options.description: Language (code ['-' region] or name) to be added.

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Relative path of the assembly file to be added.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove an assembly from the list of sources.

options.name: --assembly
options.description:
Relative path, sub-path, or name of the assembly file to be
removed.
To remove a language, delete the translation file from the
.tnt/ subdirectory.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract all strings from all sources and update the

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show all the translations and their status.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export all strings to Excel or XLIFF files.

options.name: --language
options.description: Language (code ['-' region] or name) to be exported.

options.name: --to
options.description:
The directory to export the files to. Default is the current
directory.

options.name: --format
options.description:
Export format (default 'excel'). Use 'xliff' for an xliff
version 1.2 editor, 'xliff-mat' for the Multilingual App
Toolkit.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0      The language(s) to export, use --all to export all
languages.

commands.name: import
commands.description:
Import Excel or XLIFF translation files and apply the
changes to the translations in the current directory.

options.name: --language
options.description: Language (code ['-' region] or name) to be imported.

options.name: --from
options.description:
The directory to import the Excel or XLIFF files from.
Default is the current directory.

options.name: --all
options.description:
Import all .xlsx, .xlf, or .xliff files that match the
current directory's name.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0      The files or languages to import, use --all to import all
files.

options.name: --all
options.description: Translate new strings of all languages.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0    The language(s) to translate new strings to, use --all to
translate all languages.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Synchronize all the translations in the '.tnt-content'

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show system related or detail information.

options.name: --language
options.description:
Language (code ['-' region] or name) that restricts the
detail's scope.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0      The detail to show: 'languages' shows the currently
supported languages, 'new' the strings that are not
translated yet, 'unused' the strings that are not used
anymore, 'shared' the strings that appear in multiple
contexts.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0    When the shell command should run: 'before-extract' runs the
shell command before the extraction of the strings.
value pos. 1    The shell command to add.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
value pos. 0    The time all commands are removed: 'before-extract' runs the
shell command before the extraction of the strings.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
